parameters.name: list_knowledge
parameters.description: List all knowledge collections in OpenWebUI with their IDs, names, descriptions, and file counts.

parameters.name: create_knowledge
parameters.description: Create a new knowledge collection in OpenWebUI. Parameters: name (collection name), description (optional description)

parameters.name: get_knowledge
parameters.description: Get details of a knowledge collection including its files. Parameters: knowledge_id (collection ID)

parameters.name: update_knowledge
parameters.description: Update name or description of a knowledge collection. Parameters: knowledge_id (collection ID), name (new name, optional), description (new description, optional)

parameters.name: delete_knowledge
parameters.description: Delete a knowledge collection from OpenWebUI. Parameters: knowledge_id (collection ID)

parameters.name: list_files
parameters.description: List all uploaded files in OpenWebUI with their IDs, names, sizes, and types.

parameters.name: upload_file
parameters.description: Download a file from a URL and upload it into an OpenWebUI knowledge collection. Parameters: knowledge_id (collection ID), url (source URL to download), filename (name for the file, e.g. report.pdf)

value.url: ={{ $fromAI('url', 'Source URL to download the file from', 'string') }}
value.filename: ={{ $fromAI('filename', 'Filename for the uploaded file, e.g. report.pdf', 'string') }}

parameters.name: ingest_web_url
parameters.description: Fetch a web page, extract its content, and add it to an OpenWebUI knowledge collection for RAG. Parameters: knowledge_id (collection ID), url (web page URL to ingest)

parameters.name: remove_file
parameters.description: Remove a file from an OpenWebUI knowledge collection and delete it. Parameters: knowledge_id (collection ID), file_id (file ID to remove)
